summary: The diff shows comprehensive replacement of 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten' across the frontend codebase. All key files identified in REQ-71 have been updated: CMSContext.tsx default data, HeroEditor.tsx defaults/placeholders, Header.tsx fallback text, Footer.tsx fallback text, index.html title/meta, About.tsx fallbacks, and project_state.json. The frontend-file-summaries.txt also confirms the replacements. No other content, logic, or styling appears to have been changed.
